title: Bloom of the Flower Dragon
author: Tracey West
desc: A tiny Flower Dragon needs help to save his tribe from a terrible werewolf! 🌼

q.en: How does the Flower Dragon Wildroot first arrive at Bracken?
q.zh: 花龙 Wildroot 最初是怎么来到布拉肯的？

options.en: Griffith sends him as a gift
options.zh: Griffith 把他当作礼物送来

options.en: Drake finds him in the Dragon Caves
options.zh: Drake 在龙穴里发现了他

options.en: Oskar brings him from Stellburg according to some versions of the story
options.zh: Oskar 从 Stellburg 把他带来（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: He climbs onto Drake's arm after Drake returns
options.zh: Drake 一回来他就爬到了 Drake 的手臂上

explain.en: When Drake returns from stopping Astrid, the little Flower Dragon simply climbs onto his arm and will not leave — that is how he arrives.
explain.zh: Drake 击败 Astrid 回来时，这只小花龙自己爬到了他的手臂上，一直跟着他——他就是这么来到布拉肯的。

q.en: Who is Brighteye, and what special gift does she have?
q.zh: Brighteye 是谁？她有什么特殊能力？

options.en: A forest sprite who can see the future
options.zh: 一位能看见未来的森林精灵

options.en: The king of Stellburg
options.zh: Stellburg 的国王

options.en: A Flower Dragon from the tribe
options.zh: 花龙部落里的一只花龙

options.en: A wizard who trains Dragon Masters according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 一位训练龙主的巫师（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: Brighteye is a forest sprite (a fairy) and a friend to the Flower Dragons. She can see into the future, which is how she learned a red-eyed monster was coming.
explain.zh: Brighteye 是一位森林精灵（小仙女），也是花龙们的朋友。她能看见未来，所以提前知道一只红眼怪物即将来袭。

q.en: What does the Dragon Stone show the Dragon Masters about Wildroot's master?
q.zh: 龙石向龙主们展示了关于 Wildroot 主人的什么？

options.en: A boy named Oskar with blond, wavy hair in Stellburg
options.zh: Stellburg 一位金发卷发、名叫 Oskar 的男孩

options.en: A girl living in Bracken Castle according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 一位住在布拉肯城堡的女孩（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: The wizard Griffith
options.zh: 巫师 Griffith

options.en: King Roland himself
options.zh: Roland 国王本人

explain.en: The Dragon Stone lights up and shows a blond, wavy-haired boy walking in Stellburg — that boy is Oskar, Wildroot's chosen Dragon Master.
explain.zh: 龙石亮起光芒，显示出一位金发卷发、在 Stellburg 行走的男孩——那就是 Oskar，Wildroot 选中的龙主。

q.en: Why does Oskar hesitate to help the Flower Dragons at first?
q.zh: Oskar 一开始为什么犹豫要不要帮花龙？

options.en: He does not like flowers according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 他不喜欢花（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: He is on his way to find his missing father
options.zh: 他正要去找失踪的父亲

options.en: He wants to be king
options.zh: 他想当国王

options.en: He is afraid of dragons
options.zh: 他害怕龙

explain.en: Oskar's father left for Graystone Castle a month earlier and never came back, so Oskar is hurrying there to search for him when Drake and Ana ask for help.
explain.zh: Oskar 的父亲一个月前去 Graystone 城堡办事就再没回来，所以当 Drake 和 Ana 求助时，他正急着去那里找父亲。

q.en: How do the Flower Dragons normally stay hidden from humans?
q.zh: 花龙平时是怎么避开人类视线的？

options.en: They turn invisible at will
options.zh: 他们能随时隐身

options.en: They sleep all day
options.zh: 他们整天睡觉

options.en: They fly very high in the clouds according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 他们飞到很高的云端（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: They release a special mist that hides them
options.zh: 他们释放一种特殊的雾来隐藏自己

explain.en: Wildroot tells the Dragon Masters that Flower Dragons release a special mist that keeps humans from seeing them. When Wildroot sings, the dragons stop the illusion and become visible.
explain.zh: Wildroot 告诉龙主们，花龙会释放一种特殊雾气，让人类看不见他们。当 Wildroot 唱歌时，龙群停下幻象，才显露出来。

q.en: What kind of monster is threatening Stellburg, and how is it made?
q.zh: 威胁 Stellburg 的是什么怪物？它是怎么来的？

options.en: A stone statue come to life according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 一座活过来的石头雕像（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: A werewolf, created by eating moonberries
options.zh: 一只狼人，因吃下月光莓而变成

options.en: A giant Finsterbun
options.zh: 一只巨大的 Finsterbun

options.en: A fire-breathing dragon
options.zh: 一条喷火的龙

explain.en: The monster is a werewolf. Brighteye explains that anyone who eats the white moonberries deep in the Dark Forest turns into a werewolf — and Oskar's father ate them.
explain.zh: 怪物是一只狼人。Brighteye 解释说，任何在黑暗森林深处吃下白色月光莓的生物都会变成狼人——而 Oskar 的父亲正是吃了它。

q.en: What does the Stellburg rhyme say will stop the werewolf?
q.zh: Stellburg 的童谣说，什么能阻止狼人？

options.en: A pitchfork and a brave villager according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 一把草叉和勇敢的村民（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: The dragon's bloom
options.zh: 龙的绽放（the dragon's bloom）

options.en: The king's army
options.zh: 国王的军队

options.en: A wall of stone
options.zh: 一堵石墙

explain.en: The rhyme goes: 'The werewolf will bring only danger and doom, unless it is stopped by the dragon's bloom.' The 'bloom' is the Flower Dragons' special power.
explain.zh: 童谣是：「狼人只会带来危险与毁灭，除非被龙的绽放所阻止。」这里的「绽放」指的就是花龙的特殊力量。

q.en: Why do the Dragon Masters lead the Finsterbuns to a chamomile field?
q.zh: 龙主们为什么把 Finsterbuns 引到一片洋甘菊田？

options.en: To feed them so they stop eating the starflowers
options.zh: 喂饱它们，让它们不再啃食星花

options.en: To teach them to dance
options.zh: 教它们跳舞

options.en: To hide them from the werewolf according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 把它们藏起来躲避狼人（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: To make them into pets
options.zh: 把它们变成宠物

explain.en: The Finsterbuns flee the werewolf and start eating the starflowers, which the Flower Dragons need for their power. The gang leads them to a chamomile field so the dragons can keep their starflowers.
explain.zh: Finsterbuns 为了躲避狼人跑来啃食星花，而花龙正需要星花来积蓄力量。于是大家把它们引到洋甘菊田，保住了花龙的星花。

q.en: How does Ana's Sun Dragon Kepri help the Flower Dragons prepare?
q.zh: Ana 的太阳龙 Kepri 是怎么帮助花龙准备的？

options.en: She sings a lullaby
options.zh: 她唱摇篮曲

options.en: She carries them to safety according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 她把花龙载到安全的地方（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: She beams warm sunlight so they can power up even at night
options.zh: 她射出温暖的阳光，让花龙即使夜晚也能充能

options.en: She freezes the werewolf
options.zh: 她冻住了狼人

explain.en: Flower Dragons eat sunlight to power up. Kepri beams soft sunlight so the dragons can perform Bloom even if the werewolf attacks after dark.
explain.zh: 花龙靠阳光获得力量。Kepri 射出柔和的阳光，让花龙即使狼人在夜间来袭也能施展「绽放」。

q.en: Who is the werewolf revealed to be at the end of the story?
q.zh: 故事最后，狼人其实是谁？

options.en: Griffith in disguise
options.zh: 伪装起来的 Griffith

options.en: The king of Stellburg
options.zh: Stellburg 的国王

options.en: Oskar's missing father
options.zh: Oskar 失踪的父亲

options.en: A stranger from the Dark Forest
options.zh: 黑暗森林里的一个陌生人

explain.en: When the Flower Dragons perform Bloom, the werewolf changes back into a man — Oskar's father, who had eaten moonberries a month earlier and been lost in the Dark Forest.
explain.zh: 当花龙施展「绽放」后，狼人变回了一个人——正是 Oskar 的父亲，他一个月前吃了月光莓，在黑暗森林里迷失了。
